text:
There once was a young girl named Anna. She lived at the edge of a vast forest. Each morning she'd wake up and listen to the birds singing. One morning the birds didn'd sing. Instead there was just silence. That worried Anna.

She scampered outside. Nothing was amiss. Then she went back to sleep. Time passed. Birds didn't sing. She peered outside. One big eagle had wings wrapped around a tree.

Anna whispered. It shook its head. Those were black feathers. It couldn't talk. That was sad.

She woke up Mr. Owl. "Help!" she whispered.

He shaked his head too.

Finally she climbed up on his back. They flew around until Mr. Owl opened his eyes. "Oh, my dear!"

"It's a sparrow."

He chuckled. "Oh, that doesn't make sense."

"Oh it does!" Anna giggled. "Look!"

It wasn'd sing.

"Oh!" she laughed.

That night the whole
